name: zsys_find_file_on_drive_type
description: zSys::FindFileOnDriveType scans logical drives of a requested type and returns null when the relative file is not found.
known_limits: The smoke verifies the negative search path without depending on a particular host drive layout.
Binary-safe verification remains pending for GetLogicalDriveStringsA/GetDriveTypeA/stat call shape and stack-buffer layout.
